description: Covers the minimum engine backbone validation scenario.
Validates that hit height bands block low projectiles while allowing elevated projectiles to resolve against elevated targets.
Validates that crossing projected paths do not cause off-lane interception during parabola flight.
Validates that high-speed linear projectiles still register hits through swept-segment collision instead of skipping through targets.
Validates that terminal-hit projectiles can drive explode-tagged area damage at their impact point.
Validates that BattleScenario spawn entries can instantiate entities from EntityTemplate resources and preserve template identity through runtime events.
Validates that EntityFactory can build template-defined runtime triggers so attack, retaliation, and death behaviors come from template resources instead of BattleManager branches.
Validates that BattleSpawnEntry can resolve templates by registry id and that scene-level overrides win over template projectile defaults.
Validates that the air interceptor sample can hit low and medium air targets through the shared template chain.
Validates that the repeater burst sample can spawn repeated projectiles and damage walker and runner targets in two lanes.
Validates that cabbage and melon lobber samples can spawn their dedicated projectile templates and resolve direct-hit and explode-tagged damage.
Validates that the new zombie roster samples can all attack the wall barrier sample through the common zombie runtime.
Validates that invalid template resources, malformed trigger bindings, and malformed override combinations are rejected through protocol issues before runtime execution.
Validates that invalid protocol content, including unsupported target modes, is rejected through protocol.issue events before projectile or damage execution can continue.
